// ==== koine/generated/billing/Currency.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

enum class Currency {
    EUR,
    USD,
    GBP;

    companion object {
        /**
         * The member whose key (name) matches Currency, or null if none does.
         */
        fun tryFromKey(key: String): Currency? = entries.find { it.name == key }

        /**
         * The member whose key (name) matches Currency, throwing if none does.
         */
        fun fromKey(key: String): Currency = tryFromKey(key) ?: throw koine.runtime.DomainException("no Currency with key '$key'")
    }
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/Customer.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

class Customer(
    id: CustomerId,
    name: String,
    email: Email,
) {
    val id: CustomerId = id
    val name: String = name
    val email: Email = email

    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
        this === other || (other is Customer && this.id == other.id)

    override fun hashCode(): Int = this.id.hashCode()
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/CustomerId.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

/**
 * A strongly-typed identity value for Customer.
 */
@JvmInline
value class CustomerId(val value: java.util.UUID) {
    companion object {
        /**
         * Mints a fresh, random identity (a v4 UUID).
         */
        fun generate(): CustomerId = CustomerId(java.util.UUID.randomUUID())
    }
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/Email.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

data class Email(
    val raw: String,
) {
    init {
        if (!(Regex("^[^@]+@[^@]+\$").containsMatchIn(raw))) throw koine.runtime.DomainException("invalid email address")
    }
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/Money.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

data class Money(
    val amount: java.math.BigDecimal,
    val currency: Currency,
) {
    init {
        if (!(amount.compareTo(java.math.BigDecimal.ZERO) >= 0)) throw koine.runtime.DomainException("a monetary amount cannot be negative")
    }

    /**
     * Scales this Money by a factor.
     */
    operator fun times(factor: Long): Money = Money(this.amount.multiply(java.math.BigDecimal.valueOf(factor)), this.currency)
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/Order.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

class Order(
    id: OrderId,
    customer: CustomerId,
    lines: List<OrderLine>,
) {
    val id: OrderId = id
    val customer: CustomerId = customer
    val lines: List<OrderLine> = lines.toList()
    val status: OrderStatus = OrderStatus.Draft

    init {
        checkInvariants()
    }

    private fun checkInvariants() {
        if ((this.lines.isEmpty()) && !(this.status == OrderStatus.Draft)) throw koine.runtime.DomainException("invariant violated")
    }

    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
        this === other || (other is Order && this.id == other.id)

    override fun hashCode(): Int = this.id.hashCode()
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/OrderId.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

/**
 * A strongly-typed identity value for Order.
 */
@JvmInline
value class OrderId(val value: java.util.UUID) {
    companion object {
        /**
         * Mints a fresh, random identity (a v4 UUID).
         */
        fun generate(): OrderId = OrderId(java.util.UUID.randomUUID())
    }
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/OrderLine.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

data class OrderLine(
    val product: ProductId,
    val quantity: Long,
    val unitPrice: Money,
) {
    val subtotal: Money get() = this.unitPrice.times(this.quantity)
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/OrderRepository.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

/**
 * Persistence-ignorant repository contract for the Order aggregate root.
 */
interface OrderRepository {
    /**
     * Loads the aggregate by its identity, or null if absent.
     */
    fun getById(id: OrderId): Order?

    /**
     * Persists a new aggregate.
     */
    fun add(aggregate: Order)

    /**
     * Persists changes to an existing aggregate.
     */
    fun update(aggregate: Order)

    /**
     * Removes the aggregate with the given identity.
     */
    fun remove(id: OrderId)
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/OrderStatus.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

enum class OrderStatus {
    Draft,
    Placed,
    Shipped,
    Cancelled;

    companion object {
        /**
         * The member whose key (name) matches OrderStatus, or null if none does.
         */
        fun tryFromKey(key: String): OrderStatus? = entries.find { it.name == key }

        /**
         * The member whose key (name) matches OrderStatus, throwing if none does.
         */
        fun fromKey(key: String): OrderStatus = tryFromKey(key) ?: throw koine.runtime.DomainException("no OrderStatus with key '$key'")
    }
}

// ==== koine/generated/billing/ProductId.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.billing

/**
 * A strongly-typed identity value referenced by this context but owned elsewhere.
 */
@JvmInline
value class ProductId(val value: java.util.UUID)

// ==== koine/runtime/Runtime.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.runtime

/**
 * Thrown when a domain invariant is violated. An unchecked exception (every Kotlin exception is
 * unchecked) so generated value objects, entities, and aggregates can guard their invariants without
 * ceremony — the Kotlin analogue of the C# emitter's DomainInvariantViolationException and the JVM
 * sibling's koine.runtime.DomainException.
 *
 * Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.
 */
class DomainException(message: String) : RuntimeException(message)

/**
 * A closed interval [start, end] over a Comparable type — the Kotlin analogue of the JVM sibling's
 * koine.runtime.Range. The caller is responsible for start <= end (a domain invariant).
 *
 * Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.
 */
data class Range<T : Comparable<T>>(val start: T, val end: T) {
    /** True when [value] lies within the closed interval [start, end]. */
    fun contains(value: T): Boolean = start <= value && value <= end

    /** True when this interval and [other] share at least one point. */
    fun overlaps(other: Range<T>): Boolean = start <= other.end && other.start <= end
}
